ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the service */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "subscription_type" TEXT /* Type of subscription (e.g., free, premium) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "songs" (
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each song */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the song */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who created the song */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album the song belongs to */,
  "duration_ms" INTEGER /* Duration of the song in milliseconds */,
  "time_signature" INTEGER /* Time signature of the song */,
  "explicit_content" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the song contains explicit content */,
  "lyrics_url" TEXT /* URL to the song's lyrics */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* A score indicating the song's popularity */,
  "cover_art_url" TEXT /* URL to the song's cover art */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre the artist belongs to */,
  "biography" TEXT /* A text field for the artist's biography */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the artist's profile picture */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL to the artist's official website */,
  "social_media_url" TEXT /* URL to the artist's social media profile */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artists_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the album */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who created the album */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the album */,
  "cover_art_url" TEXT /* URL to the album's cover art */,
  "total_tracks" INTEGER /* Total number of tracks in the album */,
  "is_compilation" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the album is a compilation */,
  "label" TEXT /* Name of the record label */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* A text field for the genre's description */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audio_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audio feature */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song the feature belongs to */,
  "danceability" REAL /* Danceability of the song */,
  "energy" REAL /* Energy of the song */,
  "loudness" REAL /* Loudness of the song */,
  "mode" INTEGER /* Mode of the song */,
  "speechiness" REAL /* Speechiness of the song */,
  "acousticness" REAL /* Acousticness of the song */,
  "instrumentalness" REAL /* Instrumentalness of the song */,
  "liveness" REAL /* Liveness of the song */,
  "valence" REAL /* Valence of the song */,
  "tempo" REAL /* Tempo of the song */,
  "key" TEXT /* The key of the song (e.g., C, D, E) */,
  "loudness_range" REAL /* The range of loudness in the song */,
  "tempo_confidence" REAL /* Confidence in the tempo measurement */,
  "time_signature_confidence" REAL /* Confidence in the time signature measurement */,
  "key_confidence" REAL /* Confidence in the key measurement */,
  "mode_confidence" REAL /* Confidence in the mode measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audio_features_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "listening_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each listening history entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who listened to the song */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song listened to */,
  "playback_date" TEXT /* Date the song was listened to */,
  "playback_time" TEXT /* Time the song was listened to */,
  "playback_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the playback in milliseconds */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for playback (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user during playback (optional) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listening_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listening_history_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the playlist */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the playlist was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the playlist was last updated */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the playlist is public */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_songs" (
  "playlist_song_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist song */,
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist the song belongs to */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song in the playlist */,
  "added_at" TEXT /* Date and time the song was added to the playlist */,
  "added_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the song to the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_songs_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_songs_added_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("added_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_songs_playlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("playlist_id") REFERENCES playlists ("playlist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the recommendation */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song recommended */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date the recommendation was made */,
  "seen" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user has seen the recommendation */,
  "liked" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user liked the recommendation */,
  "disliked" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user disliked the recommendation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who has the preference */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre the user prefers */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist the user prefers */,
  "preference_strength" INTEGER /* A score indicating the strength of the preference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "song_genres" (
  "song_genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each song genre */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song the genre belongs to */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  "primary_genre" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the genre is primary for the song */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_song_genres_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_song_genres_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)
